cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Research shows family estrangement exists on a spectrum rather than being all-or-nothing. Support plays a crucial role in helping people navigate reduced contact, whether they seek reconciliation or not.

cards.title: Wonder Shapes How Children Learn
cards.body: Babies actively use wonder from birth to transform experience into understanding, not passively absorbing information. Parents can cultivate this natural curiosity at home to support deeper learning.

cards.title: Childcare Costs and Family Affordability
cards.body: The government is investing billions to help families with childcare, but hidden charges may prevent families from seeing the full benefit. Policy efforts aim to ensure childcare costs don't prevent people from raising children.

cards.title: Female Child Sexual Abuse Perpetrators
cards.body: New research reveals that women who abuse children often use grooming tactics, yet victims rarely disclose the abuse. This understudied area highlights the need for better awareness and support systems.
